description: Search EU legislation, CJEU case law, and treaties; traverse CELLAR graph; browse EuroVoc concepts.
name: io.github.cyanheads/eur-lex-mcp-server

environmentVariables.description: The hostname for the HTTP server.
environmentVariables.name: MCP_HTTP_HOST

environmentVariables.description: The port to run the HTTP server on.
environmentVariables.name: MCP_HTTP_PORT

environmentVariables.description: The endpoint path for the MCP server.
environmentVariables.name: MCP_HTTP_ENDPOINT_PATH

environmentVariables.description: Public origin for deployments behind a TLS-terminating reverse proxy (e.g. https://mcp.example.com).
environmentVariables.name: MCP_PUBLIC_URL

environmentVariables.description: Sets the minimum log level for output (e.g., 'debug', 'info', 'warn').
environmentVariables.name: MCP_LOG_LEVEL

environmentVariables.description: CELLAR SPARQL endpoint URL override (e.g., for a local Virtuoso mirror).
environmentVariables.name: CELLAR_SPARQL_ENDPOINT

environmentVariables.description: EUR-Lex content API base URL override.
environmentVariables.name: EURLEX_CONTENT_BASE_URL

environmentVariables.description: Client-side timeout for SPARQL requests in milliseconds.
environmentVariables.name: SPARQL_QUERY_TIMEOUT_MS

environmentVariables.description: Enforced ceiling on LIMIT in all generated SPARQL queries.
environmentVariables.name: MAX_SPARQL_RESULTS
